name: Default Handler
description: Default Handler lets you change the default handler for URL schemes. Edovia created this to make it easy to set their Screens app as the default handler for the vnc: URL scheme, as App Store sandboxing doesn’t allow for choosing this at runtime — apps must designate a default handler in the app bundle settings, a static configuration. However, this works for other URL schemes and applications as well, not just Screens and the vnc scheme.
